title: Resource Theories: A Unified Framework
description: Master the mathematical framework of quantum resource theories - understanding free states, free operations, and resource monotones that unify diverse quantum phenomena under a single conceptual umbrella.
learningObjectives: Define the three components of a resource theory: free states, free operations, and resource states
Understand the axiomatic structure that unifies different quantum resources
Construct resource monotones and prove their key properties
Analyze resource manipulation protocols and their limitations
Compare and contrast different resource theories in quantum information
Apply the resource-theoretic framework to practical quantum information tasks
